title: [PatPat] BLÅHAJ Animation
description: A resource pack for the PatPat mod that replaces the hand with a BLÅHAJ.
body:
Always wanted to slap someone on the head with a BLÅHAJ? This is your chance! 

This resource pack replaces the default hand from the [PatPat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/patpat) mod with a BLÅHAJ. It makes a squishy toy sound when you hit something!

![A player is getting an IKEA shark plushie slapped onto their head repeatedly.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/458bdd44cc7f13f86f677cd2aeb4288bf9a1474b.gif)

Be careful when you pet a player called cakejumper... Or a fox.

"It's blahajin' time." He said before blahajing all over the place.
